D

Deck - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model
Represents a deck of cards used in a game.
Deck() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Deck
Constructs an empty deck of cards.
DeckEmptyException - Exception Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Exceptions
Exception thrown when draw is attempted on an empty deck.
DeckEmptyException(String) - Constructor for exception class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Exceptions.DeckEmptyException
Constructs a new DeckEmptyException with the specified detail message.
decrementCounter(Content) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.ContentCounter
Decrements the count of the object or the resource passed as a parameter
deleteGame(int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.GameManager
Deletes a game from the game list.
disconnect() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Client.Client
Disconnects from the server.
disconnect() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Client.RMIClient
Disconnects from the server.
disconnect() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Client.SocketClient
Disconnects from the server.
DisplayedObjectiveMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient
Message from server to client containing the displayed objective cards.
DisplayedObjectiveMessage(int, List<ObjectiveCard>) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.DisplayedObjectiveMessage
Constructs a DisplayedObjectiveMessage with the specified parameters.
DisplayedPlayableCardsMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient
Message from server to client containing the displayed playable cards.
DisplayedPlayableCardsMessage(int, ArrayList<PlayableCard>) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.DisplayedPlayableCardsMessage
Constructs a DisplayedPlayableCardsMessage with the specified parameters.
displayFirstMessage(int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.CLI.Cli
Displays the first message upon successful connection.
displayFirstMessage(int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.GUIView
Displays the first message upon successful connection, showing an information alert.
displayFirstMessage(int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.View
Displays the first message upon successful connection.
displayGameList(HashMap<Integer, Integer>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.CLI.Cli
Displays the list of available games in the CLI.
displayGameList(HashMap<Integer, Integer>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.GUIView
Displays the list of available games in the lobby GUI controller.
displayGameList(HashMap<Integer, Integer>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.View
Displays the list of games.
DOUBLE_DOWN_LEFT - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Structure
 
DOUBLE_DOWN_RIGHT - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Structure

DOUBLE_UP_RIGHT - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Structure
 
draw() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Deck
Draws the top card from the deck.
draw(Deck) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Player
Draws a card from the specified deck and adds it to the player's hand.
draw(String, boolean) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Controller.GameController
Allows a player to draw from a deck.
drawCard(Boolean) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.GameBoardController
Constructs and sends a DrawMessage to the server based on the specified deckWanted parameter.
drawDisplayedPlayableCard(PlayableCard, Player) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Game
Draws a displayed playable card for a player, handling card replacement and notifying clients.
drawDisplayedPlayableCard(String, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Controller.GameController
Allows a player to draw one of the displayed card.
drawGold(MouseEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.GameBoardController
Handles the event of drawing a gold card by calling the drawCard method with the deckWanted parameter set to false.
DrawMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ClientToServer
Message from client to server to request to draw a card
DrawMessage(int, String, boolean) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ClientToServer.DrawMessage
Constructs a DrawMessage with the specified client ID, nickname, and deck type.
drawResource(MouseEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.GameBoardController
Handles the event of drawing a resource card by calling the drawCard method with the deckWanted parameter set to true.
